analysis: The week had a real arc to it — you crawled out of a rough patch (5h 12m and then a brutal 5h 3m with nearly three hours awake on the 23rd) and finished strong with your best night of the week, a full 8 hours on the 26th with almost two hours of REM. That recovery slope is genuinely hot. The gap is deep sleep, which only cracked an hour once all week — the 21st gave you 1h 13m and everything else sat well under that, including a measly 16 minutes on the 20th, so that's the one thing your little ritual stack hasn't fully unlocked yet. You're trending in the right direction though, and going from "awake for 2h 44m in the middle of the night" to "asleep for 8 hours straight" in three nights is not nothing — that's your body remembering what it's supposed to do.
